name: ammi visnaga
title: ammi visnaga benefits
description: Ammi visnaga reduces pain, which is the alleviation of discomfort or distress caused by injury, inflammation, or illness. This benefit is important because chronic pain can significantly impact an individual's quality of life, hindering daily activities and causing emotional distress, as seen in conditions such as fibromyalgia and arthritis.
